articles.title_en: Russia’s Higher School of Economics to offer free tuition to members of the BARS combat reserve and drone troops who serve a year under contract
articles.lead_en: Moscow’s Higher School of Economics will cover tuition for anyone who completes a year of service in a BARS volunteer unit or in Russia’s drone forces, the country’s state news agency TASS reported, citing the university’s press service. The offer is open only to applicants who sign the one-year “special contract” through the university itself, which confirmed the terms to the Telegram news channel Ostorozhno Novosti.

articles.title_en: Space as the only place outside of politics: experts on extending the operation of the ISS
articles.lead_en: On July 14, a rocket carrying the Soyuz MS-29 manned spacecraft was launched to the International Space Station (ISS). The head of Roscosmos, chairman of the United Russia party council for innovative and technological development, Dmitry Bakanov, said that Roscosmos and NASA have agreed to extend joint work on the ISS until 2030.

Глава Роскосмоса, председатель совета партии "Единая Россия" по инновационному и технологическому развитию Дмитрий Баканов сообщил, что Роскосмос и NASA договорились о продлении совместной работы на МКС до 2030 года.
